flake

(flake 4') [...] and rain.

[* mulₓ(GA₂)U.RI].RI ana mulₓ(GA₂)gišGIGIR KU.[NU-ma ...]

flake 8'8'

(flake 9') (If) U.RI.RI approaches the Crab: [...].

flake 10'10'
